final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional step-by-step diagram showing how to deploy Hermes inside a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan, designed as a clear technical infographic with numbered steps 1-2-3-4.

Style/medium: clean technical infographic, flat UI illustration style with clear visual hierarchy
Composition: vertical layout with 4 clearly separated numbered panels stacked top to bottom, each panel containing an icon, a command block, and a short label
Subject: 
  Step 1 — Pull the Hermes Docker image: terminal window showing `docker pull hermes` command, Docker whale icon
  Step 2 — Run the Hermes container: terminal showing `docker run -d --name hermes -p 8080:8080 hermes` command, container icon with port arrow
  Step 3 — Configure GLMCodingPlan integration: config file or environment variable panel showing GLMCodingPlan API endpoint and key fields, plug/link icon
  Step 4 — Verify connection: terminal or dashboard showing health-check output confirming Hermes + GLMCodingPlan are connected, green checkmark icon
Scene/backdrop: light neutral white background with subtle grid lines suggesting a technical document
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: neutral white background, Docker blue accent for container steps, green for success/verify step, consistent monochrome code block backgrounds
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): Step 1、Step 2、Step 3、Step 4 as bold numbered labels on each panel; "docker pull hermes"、"docker run"、"GLMCodingPlan" as code-block text
Constraints: all 4 steps visible and clearly separated, numbered labels 1 2 3 4 prominent, code snippets legible, consistent icon style across all panels
Avoid: decorative gradients, photorealistic rendering, artistic flourishes, illegible small text, dark background that reduces readability
